meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't deploy apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding to Deploy SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Overcome deployment hurdles by mastering user onboarding. A technical guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch professional SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure often stems from poor user lifecycle management, not just infrastructure. By implementing structured user onboarding, you validate your product-market fit and ensure your app handles user state correctly. Use Antigravity to scaffold your backend and Claude Code to automate the deployment integration for a seamless, professional finish.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks grinding in your IDE, architecting the perfect AI-powered solution, only to hit a wall when it is time to deploy. The code runs locally, but in the wild, the complexity of user state and authentication feels like a labyrinth. You are not just struggling with servers; you are struggling with the transition from a script to a product.

The secret to successful deployment is treating user onboarding as the foundation of your architecture. When you design a robust onboarding flow, you are actually stress-testing your database, auth tokens, and environment variables. Master this, and the 'can't deploy' error messages become a relic of your past.

steps.title: Define the User State Schema
steps.description: Before deployment, you must ensure your database can track onboarding progress. This prevents 'ghost' users that break deployment pipelines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a User model that includes onboarding_step (enum), profile_complete (boolean), and last_login (timestamp).
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Generate user schema migrations and verify with local database'

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Workflow Logic
steps.description: Implement a state machine to guide users through the app. This ensures users are only hitting deployment-sensitive features once initialized.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a state machine service in TypeScript to handle user onboarding transitions: 'signed_up' -> 'profile_setup' -> 'api_key_configured' -> 'ready'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Implement onboarding state machine service and unit test transitions'

steps.title: Configure Environment-Specific Auth
steps.description: Deployment often fails due to bad auth redirects. Map your onboarding flow to environment variables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication middleware that checks the onboarding_step and redirects users to the appropriate setup route if incomplete.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Apply auth middleware to protected routes and verify environment variable injection'

steps.title: Implement Onboarding Analytics
steps.description: Track where users drop off during onboarding to identify if your app's complexity is causing deployment-time errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an event tracking utility for onboarding milestones that integrates with PostHog or segment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Integrate analytics tracking into onboarding flow components'

steps.title: Final Deployment Readiness Check
steps.description: Automate the final check to ensure all onboarding assets are built and environment variables are satisfied.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment validation script that checks for missing env vars and validates onboarding state machine integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Run production readiness check script and push to staging'

pro_tips: Always initialize your database with a default 'onboarding_step' of 'initial' to avoid null pointer exceptions during early deployment testing.
Use feature flags to toggle onboarding steps; this allows you to hotfix your flow without a full redeployment.
Never hardcode redirect URLs; use a relative path mapping that respects your base domain structure across staging and production.
Implement an 'onboarding reset' button for your debug environment to test the full lifecycle without creating new test accounts.
Log onboarding errors to a dedicated channel; often, deployment issues are actually uncaught exceptions in the user's first 30 seconds.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, integrate a CI/CD pipeline (like GitHub Actions) to automate your build process, ensuring your onboarding flow is tested every time you push code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to move beyond local environments and launch a production-ready application that users love. Stop wrestling with deployments and start shipping features. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
